title: molten, garlicky, crowd-pleaser saudi-arabian grape tomatoes biryani
description: a flavorful saudi-arabian dish featuring grape tomatoes, perfect for a weeknight dinner, and easily serves 6-8 people.
instructions: heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and fragrant, about 5 minutes.
add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
add the grape tomatoes and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they start to release their juices.
add the basmati rice, cumin powder, coriander powder, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
add 2 cups of water to the saucepan, and bring the mixture to a boil.
reduce the heat to low, cover the saucepan, and simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender.
fluff the biryani with a fork, and serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
